title: FINANCIAL SUPPORT - 211info
text: LEUKEMIA AND LYMPHOMA SOCIETY FINANCIAL SUPPORT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides medical expense assistance programs to help with insurance co-payments and/or insurance premium costs for prescription drugs related to blood cancer treatment. Also, may Provide financial assistance for ground transportation, air travel, and lodging-related expenses. 3 International Drive Suite 200 Rye Brook, NY 10573 Eligibility: -Must have a confirmed blood cancer diagnosis -Must have income no higher than 500% of the Federal Poverty Level -Must be a United States citizen or permanent resident Additionally, for the Co-Pay Assistance Program: Must have medical and/or prescription insurance Hours: Monday-Friday 6am-6pm Email (877) 557-2672 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (877) 557-2672 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call, email, or visit website for more information or to apply FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Nationwide Services: Health Insurance Premium Assistance * Cancer Incidental Medical Expense Assistance * Cancer Prescription Expense Assistance * Cancer Other Services Offered At This Location: INFORMATION SERVICES - INFORMATION SPECIALISTS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LEUKEMIA AND LYMPHOMA SOCIETY
